steps.title: Interpret the given point
steps.content: The point (5,7) lies on the graph of y = f(x). By definition, when x = 5 the corresponding y-value is f(5). Hence, $$ f(5) = 7 $$.

steps.title: Match the result to the choices
steps.content: The computed value 7 matches choice B. That matches choice B — B is correct.
